msg: No tuning artifacts found for croqtile/matmul_fp16fp32_512x16384x16384
PLANNED iter002_wn256: Increase WARP_N from 128 to 256 to double compute per warpgroup, improving arithmetic intensity
PLANNED iter003_ws_1p3c: Switch to 1p3c warp-specialized kernel with TILE_M=192, tripling consumer parallelism
PLANNED iter004_nonpersist: Switch to non-persistent CTA launch - 1024 blocks instead of 114 persistent SMs to maximize parallelism
PLANNED iter005_stages2_wn192: Reduce pipeline stages from 4 to 2 and WARP_N from 256 to 192 to reduce shared memory and bank conflicts
PLANNED iter006_tk128: Increase TILE_K from 64 to 128 to double arithmetic intensity
PLANNED iter007_wn128_step: Use WARP_N=128 with step-based TMA for RHS to improve memory coalescing
PLANNED iter008_persis_nmajor: Persistent kernel with N-major tile iteration for better RHS cache reuse
PLANNED iter009_tk128_wn128: Reduce WARP_N to 128 but increase TILE_K to 128 to increase arithmetic intensity
PLANNED iter009_tk128_wn128: Increase pipeline stages from 4 to 6 to better hide memory latency
PLANNED iter010_hoist: Add --hoist-offset and --hoist-scale compiler flags to optimize address calculations
PLANNED iter011_stmatrix: Use --stmatrix compiler flag for faster WGMMA accumulator store
PLANNED iter012_ptxbar: Use --ptx-barrier flag for PTX mbarrier synchronization
PLANNED iter013_stages3: Reduce pipeline stages from 4 to 3 to lower shared memory and increase occupancy
PLANNED iter014_tk32: Reduce TILE_K from 64 to 32 to reduce register pressure and potentially improve occupancy
PLANNED iter015_wn128s6: WARP_N=128 with 6 stages for higher occupancy
PLANNED iter016_ws1p2c: Warp specialization 1p2c: 1 producer + 2 consumer warps with TILE_M=128
PLANNED iter017_regcap96: Same kernel with 96 register limit to improve occupancy
PLANNED iter031_tm128_s4: TILE_M=128 (2x warpgroup rows) to improve compute density for M=512, with non-persistent CTA launch
PLANNED iter032_f16prepack: Combine native-f16 + prepack-v2 + single-thread-producer flags (each got ~340-347 TFLOPS separately)
PLANNED iter034_wn128_s3: WARP_N=128 with 3 stages to reduce SMEM from 224KB to ~56KB and improve occupancy from 7.7% to ~25%
PLANNED iter106_launchbounds: Add __launch_bounds__(256,2) to .cu kernel to force 2 blocks per SM, doubling occupancy from 12.5% to 25%. Currently 168 regs/thread limits to 1 block/SM.

PLANNED iter107_persist_1p1c: STRUCTURAL: Switch from static CTA launch to persistent 1p1c warp-specialized kernel with WARP_N=128, STAGES=4, f32 accumulator. Persistent scheduling enables all 114 SMs to stay active, reducing tail effects and improving L2 reuse.
Baseline SASS extracted via ncu (1418 lines)
Custom SASS extracted for iter017_regcap96 (1387 lines)
SASS comparison complete for iter017_regcap96 (saved to tuning/sm90_NVIDIA_H800_PCIe/croqtile/perf/matmul_fp16fp32_512x16384x16384/claude-4-5-opus-high/sass_compare_iter017_regcap96.json)

PLANNED iter108_mwg_1p3c_f32: STRUCTURAL: Multi-warpgroup 1p3c with TILE_M=192, WARP_N=128, STAGES=2, f32 accum. SASS shows cuBLAS uses 40 HGMMA vs our 4. MWG 1p3c gives 3x more HGMMA per CTA, better amortizing overhead. Barrier density drops by sharing producer.

PLANNED iter109_mwg_1p2c_wn256: STRUCTURAL: 1p2c MWG with TILE_M=128 WARP_N=256 STAGES=2 f32 accum. 2 consumer warp groups double MMA density. WARP_N=256 keeps compute per WGMMA high. 512 total blocks vs 512 in base.

PLANNED iter110_ptxbar_fastmath: Phase 2 optimization: compile base 64x256 kernel with --ptx-barrier --hoist-offset --hoist-scale choreo flags to reduce barrier density (0.034 vs cuBLAS 0.002), plus nvcc --use_fast_math. Also add #pragma unroll on K-loop in .cu

PLANNED iter111_tk32_s8_deep: Pipeline deepening: TILE_K=32 with 8 stages (vs TILE_K=64 with 4 stages). Same SMEM budget but 2x deeper pipeline for better memory latency hiding. ncu shows 43% barrier stalls indicating latency issues. SWIZ=64.

PLANNED iter112_mwg_1p2c_wn128_s4: STRUCTURAL: 1p2c MWG TILE_M=128 WARP_N=128 STAGES=4 f32. Smaller SMEM (192KB vs 229KB) may allow better occupancy. 4 M-tiles x 128 N-tiles = 512 blocks same as base. 2 consumers double MMA density.

PLANNED iter113_wn64_s3: SASS-guided: cuBLAS uses HGMMA.64x64x16 not 64x256x16. Try WARP_N=64 STAGES=3 to match cuBLAS MMA shape. Fewer registers per accumulator (64x64 vs 64x256), potentially 2 blocks/SM. Grid becomes 8*256=2048 blocks for better SM utilization.

PLANNED iter114_base_s3: SASS-guided: Our kernel has 64 ST vs cuBLAS 10. Add --stmatrix choreo flag for efficient register-to-SMEM accumulator store. May also try mma.store.transp for transposed output pattern.
PLANNED iter115_mwg_1p4c_wn64: STRUCTURAL: 1p4c MWG TILE_M=256 WARP_N=64 STAGES=3 f32. 4 consumers each doing 64x64 HGMMA matching cuBLAS pattern. 512 total blocks. 640 threads, low regs, 188KB SMEM.
PLANNED iter123_combo_best: STRUCTURAL: 1p1c WARP_N=128 STAGES=2 with maxrregcount=128 to fit 2 CTAs per SM. Doubles occupancy from 7.7% to ~15%. 80KB SMEM per CTA, 128 regs/thread.

PLANNED iter124_regctrl_trade: STRUCTURAL: Add setmaxnreg register trading to 1p1c WARP_N=256 STAGES=4. Producer dec to 40 regs, consumer inc to 216 regs. Like CUTLASS ping-pong pattern. Frees registers for consumer MMA accumulator.

PLANNED iter125_wn128_regctrl_s4: STRUCTURAL: 1p1c WARP_N=128 STAGES=4 with setmaxnreg register trading. Smaller tile = less SMEM (80KB vs 229KB), fitting 2 CTAs/SM. Producer dec 40, consumer inc 216. 1024 blocks vs 512 = better SM utilization.

PLANNED iter126_wn128_s3_2cta: STRUCTURAL: 1p1c WARP_N=128 STAGES=3 launch_bounds(256,2) NO setmaxnreg. 104KB SMEM fits 2 CTAs in 228KB. 2x occupancy. 1024 grid blocks. Natural register allocation avoids deadlock.

PLANNED iter127_wn192_s2_2cta: MACRO: 1p1c WARP_N=192 STAGES=2 launch_bounds(256,2). 112KB SMEM barely fits 2 CTAs (224KB < 228KB). 1.5x more compute per CTA vs WARP_N=128 while keeping 2 CTAs/SM. Grid: 8x86=688 blocks.
PLANNED iter128_wn128_s2_2cta: MACRO: 1p1c WARP_N=128 STAGES=2 launch_bounds(256,2). 80KB SMEM per CTA. Very comfortable 2 CTAs (160KB). Shallower pipeline but more register headroom.

PLANNED iter129_wn128_s3_unroll: Phase 2: On iter126 base (WARP_N=128 STAGES=3 2CTA), hoist warpgroup_arrive() + pragma unroll on inner K-loop + precompute stage offsets. These micro-opts showed +2-3 TFLOPS on the old WARP_N=256 base.

PLANNED iter130_tk32_s4_2cta: STRUCTURAL: TILE_K=32 SWIZ=64 STAGES=4 WARP_N=128 launch_bounds(256,2). Halved K-tile halves SMEM per stage, enabling 4-stage pipeline at 80KB SMEM (same as STAGES=2 with TILE_K=64). Deeper pipeline with 2 CTAs/SM.

PLANNED iter131_wn128_s3_fastmath: MACRO: Add --use_fast_math + --native-f16 to iter129 base. Fast math enables faster reciprocal and reduces instruction count. Native f16 may improve TMA descriptor generation.
